title: Diplodoc (frontmatter)
description: YAML frontmatter block at the top of .md files (between --- delimiters). Defines page metadata, SEO fields, resources, and access rules.

title.description: Page title for HTML head and SEO.
title.markdownDescription:
**`string`** Page title used in the browser tab, navigation sidebar, and SEO `<title>` tag.

Overrides the first `#` heading for display purposes.

description.markdownDescription: **`string`** Meta description for SEO (`<meta name="description">`). Shown in search engine snippets.

keywords.description: Keywords for the meta keywords tag.
keywords.markdownDescription:
**`string[]`** Keywords for the `<meta name="keywords">` tag.

```yaml
keywords:
  - cloud
  - storage
  - s3
```

noIndex.description: Adds noindex/nofollow meta tag to prevent search engine indexing.
noIndex.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Adds `<meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow">` to prevent search engine indexing of this page.

canonical.markdownDescription:
**`string (uri)`** Canonical URL for this page (`<link rel="canonical">`).

Use when the same content is accessible at multiple URLs.

copyright.markdownDescription: **`string`** Copyright owner string added to the page footer.

alternate.description: Alternate language versions of this page.
alternate.markdownDescription: **`Alternate[]`** Alternate language versions of this page (`<link rel="alternate" hreflang="...">`). Each item must have `href` and optionally `hreflang`.

metadata.description: Custom meta tags. Array of {name/property, content} objects or a key-value hash.
metadata.markdownDescription:
**`MetaItem[] | object`** Custom HTML `<meta>` tags.

**Array form** — explicit tag definitions: ```yaml metadata:
  - name: author
    content: John Doe
  - property: og:image
    content: https://example.com/image.png
``` **Object form** — shorthand key→value: ```yaml metadata:
  author: John Doe
```

toc.description: Show/hide the table of contents sidebar.
toc.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Show (`true`) or hide (`false`) the table-of-contents sidebar on this page.

toc-header.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Show or hide the section above the TOC (project name / logo).

search.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Show or hide the search input on this page.

feedback.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Show or hide the like / dislike feedback controls.

favicon-src.description: Custom favicon URL for this page.
favicon-src.markdownDescription: **`string`** URL to a custom favicon shown in the browser tab for this page only.

interface.description: Per-page UI overrides (takes precedence over .yfm config).
interface.markdownDescription: **`{toc, toc-header, search, feedback, favicon-src}`** Per-page UI element visibility overrides. Takes precedence over the global `.yfm` config.

resources.markdownDescription: **`Resources`** Legacy per-page resource injection. Prefer top-level `script`, `style`, `csp`.

script.description: Script file paths or URLs to include on this page.
script.markdownDescription:
**`string[]`** JavaScript files to inject into this page only.

```yaml
script:
  - _assets/custom.js
```

style.description: Stylesheet file paths or URLs to include on this page.
style.markdownDescription:
**`string[]`** CSS files to inject into this page only.

```yaml
style:
  - _assets/custom.css
```

csp.description: Content Security Policy directive overrides for this page.
csp.markdownDescription:
**`object[]`** Content Security Policy directive overrides for this page.

Each item is an object mapping a directive name to an array of allowed sources.

vcsPath.description: VCS file path override (duplicated keys allowed for this field).
vcsPath.markdownDescription: **`string`** Override the VCS path shown in the page header "Edit on GitHub" link.

sourcePath.description: Source file path (usually set by the build system).
sourcePath.markdownDescription: **`string`** Source file path — usually set automatically by the build pipeline. Do not set manually.

restricted-access.description: Access restriction rules. Each item is an array of conditions that must all be satisfied.
restricted-access.markdownDescription:
**`string[][]`** Access restriction rules.
Each inner array is a list of conditions joined by AND; outer items are joined by OR. The user must match at least one inner array fully to access the page.
```yaml restricted-access:
  - [role:admin]
  - [role:editor, group:docs-team]
```

stage.description: Document lifecycle stage (inherited from toc.yaml or set manually).
stage.markdownDescription:
**`'new' | 'preview' | 'tech-preview' | 'skip'`** Document lifecycle stage.

Inherited from the parent `toc.yaml` entry; override here for this page only.
markdownEnumDescriptions: New document. Visible only in **preview** and **tech-preview** builds. Excluded from production.
Preview stage. Visible in preview and tech-preview builds. Excluded from production unless explicitly enabled.
Tech-preview stage. Visible only in tech-preview builds.
Excluded from all builds — the page is skipped entirely.

iframes.markdownDescription:
**`object[]`** Per-domain forwarding rules.

Each item:
- `domain` **`string`** — iframe host domain to match
- `parameters` **`array`** — query parameter names to forward
iframes.description: Per-domain iframe query parameter forwarding rules.

queryParameters.description: Per-page query parameter forwarding rules for embedded iframes.
queryParameters.markdownDescription:
**`{iframes}`** Per-page query parameter forwarding rules for `<iframe>` embeds.

- `iframes` **`object[]`** — per-domain forwarding rules (each item: `domain: string`, `parameters: array`)

noIndex.description: Disallow indexing by external search engines (viewer-level override).
noIndex.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Disallow indexing by external search engines (viewer-level override).

docs-viewer.markdownDescription:
**`{noIndex}`** Per-page docs-viewer overrides.

- `noIndex` **`boolean`** — disallow external search engine indexing

disabled.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Disable the bug-report widget on this page.

form.markdownDescription: **`string`** Custom bug report form ID or URL.

yabug.markdownDescription:
**`{disabled, form}`** Per-page bug-report widget overrides.

- `disabled` **`boolean`** — disable the widget on this page
- `form` **`string`** — custom form ID

ownerId.markdownDescription: **`string | object`** Feedback widget owner ID. String for a single ID; object maps language codes to IDs.

hideHeader.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Hide the feedback widget header section.

disabled.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Disable the Yandex Feedback widget on this page.

testIds.markdownDescription: **`object`** A/B test form IDs for the feedback widget.

yafeedback.markdownDescription:
**`{ownerId, hideHeader, disabled, testIds}`** Per-page Yandex Feedback widget overrides.

- `ownerId` **`string | object`** — owner ID or per-language map
- `hideHeader` **`boolean`** — hide widget header
- `disabled` **`boolean`** — disable widget
- `testIds` **`{ownerId, hideHeader, disabled, testIds}`** — A/B test IDs

projectId.description: Map of language codes to project IDs.
projectId.markdownDescription: **`object`** Map of language codes to AI expert project IDs (e.g. `{en: 'proj-123'}`).

hasOutsideClick.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Close the AI expert widget when the user clicks outside it.

parentId.markdownDescription: **`string | null`** Parent element ID for widget placement. `null` uses the default.

disabled.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Disable the AI expert widget on this page.

customLabel.description: Map of language codes to custom widget header labels. Use "default" key for fallback. Only for whitelisted projects.
customLabel.markdownDescription: **`object`** Map of language codes to custom widget header labels. Use `default` as fallback key.

neuroExpert.markdownDescription:
**`{projectId, hasOutsideClick, parentId, ...}`** Per-page AI expert widget overrides.

- `projectId` **`{projectId, hasOutsideClick, parentId, ...}`** — language → project ID map
- `hasOutsideClick` **`boolean`** — close on outside click
- `parentId` **`string | null`** — parent element ID
- `disabled` **`boolean`** — disable widget
- `customLabel` **`{projectId, hasOutsideClick, parentId, ...}`** — language → label map

editable.description: Whether the document is editable (system-generated by doc-transform).
editable.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** *(system-generated)* Whether the document has a VCS edit link. Set automatically by `doc-transform`.

theme.description: Path to generated theme CSS (system-generated in md2md output).
theme.markdownDescription: **`string`** *(system-generated)* Path to the generated theme CSS file. Set automatically in `md` output format.

author.markdownDescription: **`Contributor`** *(system-generated)* Page author resolved from VCS history.

contributors.markdownDescription: **`Contributor[]`** *(system-generated)* List of page contributors resolved from VCS history.

updatedAt.markdownDescription: **`string`** *(system-generated)* ISO 8601 timestamp of the last VCS commit touching this file.

__system.description: System variables from presets (only when addSystemMeta is enabled).
__system.markdownDescription: **`object`** *(system-generated)* Preset variables injected when `addSystemMeta: true` is set in `.yfm`.

__metadata.description: Metadata items from presets (only when addMetadataMeta is enabled).
__metadata.markdownDescription: **`MetaItem[]`** *(system-generated)* Metadata items from presets injected when `addMetadataMeta: true` is set.

href.markdownDescription: **`string (uri)`** Absolute URL of the alternate page.

Alternate.markdownDescription: **`Alternate`** Alternate language version of this page for `<link rel="alternate">`.
Alternate.description: Alternate language version of this page.

property.markdownDescription: **`string`** `property` attribute — used for Open Graph tags (e.g. `og:title`, `og:image`).

content.markdownDescription: **`string`** Content value of the meta tag. **Required.**

MetaItem.markdownDescription: **`MetaItem`** One custom HTML `<meta>` tag. Must have exactly one of `name`, `property`, or `http-equiv`, plus `content`.

Contributor.markdownDescription: **`Contributor`** VCS contributor record — populated automatically from Git history.

Resources.markdownDescription: **`Resources`** *(legacy)* Per-page CSS/JS/CSP resources. Prefer top-level `script`, `style`, `csp` fields.

markdownDescription:
YAML frontmatter block at the very top of a `.md` file (between `---` delimiters).
Defines page metadata, SEO fields, per-page UI overrides, and access rules.
```yaml --- title: My page description: Short description for SEO --- ```
